response.original_title: The blind lane of inner mind - Debjit Bagchi
response.overview: This non narrative experimental film is based on everything that I observe when a pass through a small ally in my neighborhood when I walk for work. This little impressionistic film has been constructed from the footage that I have shot in and around that alley for last two years or so. Also this particular film can be viewed as reflection of my inner mind as well.
response.title: The blind lane of inner mind - Debjit Bagchi
